title: wsgraph — agent-mapped semantic edges for a workspace's reach graph
description: A CONTAINED kind: the deterministic reach graph (view→query, [[links]], tools/x.py mentions) is computed live in the workspace() query; this stores the extra SEMANTIC edges an agent reads out of capability prose on demand (the map-workspace-references capability). One record per workspace, keyed by workspace name; workspace() merges these edges in, marked source=agent (drawn dashed).

from.description: A node id, e.g. cap:research-row, tool:add_row.py, schema:table, query:table, view:tables.

kind.description: The relation, e.g. uses, ref, about, enforces, gates.
